use_cases: Adding animated glowing borders to card components for visual emphasis
Creating dynamic hover effects on interactive containers and buttons
Enhancing hero sections with moving light beam borders
Adding premium animated aesthetics to pricing or feature cards
Decorating overlay and modal containers with gradient lighting
ai_summary: An animated border beam effect component that creates a sweeping light gradient along container borders. Built with Framer Motion, it supports customizable light width, duration, color, and border thickness. The component uses CSS mask properties and offset-path animations to create a smooth moving beam effect that works with any rounded container.
